title: Assorted Character Stranger Things Plush Toy - 17.78cm, 1 Piece (3 Assorted Characters: Demogorgon, Eleven, or Dustin) - Soft and Detailed Plush Material from Popular Netflix Drama Series
features: STRANGER THINGS MERCHANDISE: Get your hands on this high-quality plush toy featuring your favorite characters from the popular Netflix drama series, perfect for fans of all ages!

AUTHENTIC CHARACTER DESIGNS: Choose from 3 assorted characters - Demogorgon, Eleven, or Dustin, each intricately designed and crafted with soft, detailed plush material to bring the iconic Stranger Things characters to life.
IDEAL SIZE FOR COLLECTORS: Measuring at 17.78 cm tall, these plush toys are the perfect size for displaying on shelves, desks, or taking along on your adventures in Hawkins and beyond.
EXCLUSIVE SINGLE-PICE: Each purchase contains 1 piece of random character, making them a unique collectible or a fantastic gift for friends, family, or any Stranger Things enthusiasts.

BOOST YOUR STRANGER THINGS COLLECTION: Grow your Stranger Things memorabilia with this must-have plush toy, and stand out among fellow fans with this soft, intricately designed tribute to the iconic series.
description: Introducing our assorted character Stranger Things plush toy, standing at 17.78cm tall, and available in 3 iconic characters: the enigmatic Demogorgon, the powerful Eleven, or the fun-loving Dustin. Each piece captures the unique essence of the character, reflecting the intricate details that any Stranger Things enthusiast would appreciate. Crafted from soft plush material, these toys are not only visually striking, but they are also ideal for cuddling during a binge-watch of your favorite series. The Stranger Things plush toy - a must-have for every fan, collector, or even those seeking a quirky, quality plush toy. Note: The purchase includes one piece, and the character is assorted.
